pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injects -15.0 degrees which falls squarely within this range
setup_task.sh injects +8.5 degrees which falls squarely within this range
setup_task.sh specifies an inboard span of 2.5m and outboard span of 3.8m which sum perfectly to 6.3m

privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of an OpenVSP model of an inverted gull wing. Verified that the expected output path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/inverted_gull_wing.vsp3' and result file '/tmp/task_result.json' match the instructions and export scripts. The specified inboard span (2.5m) and outboard span (3.8m) sum perfectly to the expected target_half_span (6.3m). The specified inboard anhedral (-15.0 degrees) and outboard dihedral (+8.5 degrees) fall squarely within their respective expected ranges. Discovered a critical defect: verifier.py uses a non-greedy regex to extract the Wing block which truncates at the first nested inner closing </Geom> tag, completely omitting the actual WingGeom block where Dihedral and Span parameters are stored. This permanently prevents parameter extraction, rendering the task programmatically unscorable as it caps the maximum possible score at 40/100.
